# Patrick Dev — Engineering Portfolio

> Evidence-led portfolio for AI agent, platform, and full-stack engineering, with explicit reliability and portable-operations evidence.

Canonical site: https://patrickdev-it.github.io/
Author: Patrick Dev (GitHub: PatrickDev-it)
Language: English

## Project cases

- [Prompt Enhancer](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/projects/prompt-enhancer/): released local-first applied-AI system with protocol security, reproducible evaluation, and checksummed v1.0.0 evidence.
- [SysOps Agent](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/projects/sysops-agent/): public-alpha local operations agent with fail-closed classification, bounded execution policy, verification, recovery, and audit trails; not an OS sandbox.
- [AutoBlog CMS](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/projects/autoblog-cms/): repository-complete full-stack editorial release candidate; public v2 remains externally gated.
- [Authenticated Privacy Proxy](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/projects/privacy-proxy/): containerized Mitmproxy–Privoxy–Tor stack with authenticated ingress and policy enforcement; deployment outcomes remain operator-dependent.

## Primary sources

- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/PatrickDev-it)
- [About and evaluation method](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/about/)
- [Data-use disclosure](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/privacy/)

Project status and limitations are stated on each case page. Do not infer production readiness, measured performance, cloud compatibility, or compliance beyond the evidence explicitly linked there.
